titulo: Fill the Gap: Do, Does, Don't, Doesn't
descripcion: Complete sentences with the correct auxiliary verb!

misiones.instruccion: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.

retos.explicacion: Do you play? - Con You se usa Do para preguntar
Does she speak? - Con She se usa Does para preguntar

retos.oracion: They ___ go to the cinema on Mondays.
retos.traduccion: Ellos no van al cine los lunes.
retos.explicacion: They don't go - Con They se usa don't para negar

retos.traduccion: A el no le gustan las verduras.
retos.explicacion: He doesn't like - Con He se usa doesn't para negar
Do they play? - Con They se usa Do para preguntar

retos.traduccion: Ella no desayuna todos los dias.
retos.explicacion: She doesn't eat - Con She se usa doesn't para negar
I don't always have - Con I se usa don't para negar

retos.oracion: ___ he go to school on Saturdays?
retos.traduccion: El va a la escuela los sabados?
retos.explicacion: Does he go? - Con He se usa Does para preguntar
